concepts.notes: Row-based avatar+name picker (VStack of clickable Box rows) replacing the native <select>. data-testid contract: invite-contact-list (container), invite-contact-row-<pubkeyHex> (per row). Rows are plain clickable Box elements (not LinkBox/NextLink) so selection carries no navigation (AC-UX-7).

Pure hasSelectable/isSelectionValid over entries; single owner. Mutation-gate extraction S1 (was inline, NoCoverage). isSelectionValid pins both halves of `entry.selectable && pubkeyHex===` so a stale selection on a now-disabled row cannot read as valid.
Single-sourced switch; not forked. Mutation-gate extraction S1. Takes copy.groups as a param; unknown/undefined codes fall through to inviteErrorGeneric.

already_member->inviteReasonAlreadyMember, blocked->inviteReasonBlocked. Single location; input owned by app/src/lib/contacts.ts#selectableContactsForGroup (disabledReason union: 'already_member' | 'blocked').
Unchanged by this epic; InviteMemberModal is a pure consumer. disabledReason present iff selectable === false. already_member wins over blocked when both apply.

findings_resolved: comment_rot: resolveInviteTarget docstring 'stale option value' -> 'stale picker selection' (sev 3, fixed)
a11y: disabled rows lacked aria-disabled -> added aria-disabled={!entry.selectable} (sev 3, fixed)
findings_accepted_as_noted: all-disabled contact set renders guidance state and hides blocked/member rows (sev 2 inference; preserved pre-redesign behavior, not a regression)
disabled-row reason text at row opacity 0.5 may dip below WCAG AA (sev 2 inference; acceptable under WCAG 1.4.3 disabled-control exemption)
